description: Schema example for ipa tune. Replace with your own cases referencing real notes in your vault. Put this under {vault}/.ipa/tune/testsets/testset.json, point {vault}/.ipa/config.yaml test.file at it, or pass --testset NAME|PATH.
exclude_reason: Notes that contain testset query keywords by construction (e.g. evaluation reports) should be excluded so they cannot trivially match.

metric.hit: target_filename appears in vault_search top-cap results AND its score >= threshold
metric.rank: 1-based position within the (threshold-filtered, capped) result list

cases.comment: regression case: a single query → a single target. miss = target not in top-cap or below threshold.
Multiple queries OR'd together. baseline_rank documents the score the current weights produce.

scenario_cases.user_utterance: free-form natural-language query a user might actually type
scenario_cases.comment: scenario case: multiple acceptable targets; recall_threshold=1 means hit if at least 1 target is in top10.
